subcodes.first_line: He Who is the Mentioned One saith: O concourse of creation! Ye were created for My remembrance, did ye but know it. Arise for the proclamation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المذکور یقول یا ملا الامکان قد خلقتم لذکری لو انتم تعلمون قوموا علی البیان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @call to action, @praise and encouragement
